narrative:
Trumbull County has 130,838 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.6% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.3% D−R vs +20.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
